prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on the Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for EQIX over the last 5y were used to estimate a daily drift (mean of log returns) of 0.0008 and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) of 0.0163. These parameters were then used to project the stock price over the next 20 trading days, calculating the expected price (point estimate) and confidence intervals assuming log-normally distributed future prices.
